title: STING Tools — Complete Abbreviations and Acronyms Reference
subtitle: Every abbreviation you will encounter in the BCC, StingTools dockable panel, workflow presets, and the ISO 19650 documentation chain.

entries.label: International Standard for BIM information management
entries.description: The global rulebook (Parts 1–6) governing how building data is created, named, shared, and archived across a project's lifecycle.

entries.label: British Standard 1192
entries.description: Naming conventions and CDE folder structures — superseded by ISO 19650 but still widely used for file naming.

entries.label: Publicly Available Specification 1192
entries.description: UK predecessor of ISO 19650, still referenced in legacy UK contracts. PAS 1192-2 defined CAPEX, PAS 1192-3 OPEX, PAS 1192-5 security.

entries.label: Building Information Modelling
entries.description: Process that enriches 3D geometry with cost, material, maintenance, and performance data.

entries.label: BIM Execution Plan
entries.description: Project BIM playbook: who does what, when, to what LOD/LOI, and how information is exchanged. StingTools ships 22 sector-specific BEP presets.

entries.label: Exchange Information Requirements
entries.description: The client's wish-list: what data they need, at what RIBA stage, in what format. The BEP responds to the EIR.

entries.label: Organisational Information Requirements
entries.description: High-level information needs of the client organisation (e.g. CAFM-ready asset data).

entries.label: Project Information Requirements
entries.description: OIR translated into project-specific deliverables (e.g. COBie for every MEP asset by DD3).

entries.label: Asset Information Requirements
entries.description: Data required for ongoing operations and maintenance after handover.

entries.label: Master Information Delivery Plan
entries.description: Overall timetable for who produces what information, by when, at what suitability.

entries.label: Task Information Delivery Plan
entries.description: Each discipline's detailed plan that feeds into the MIDP.

entries.label: Royal Institute of British Architects
entries.description: UK architectural body whose Plan of Work defines 8 project stages (0–7).

entries.label: Level of Detail
entries.description: How geometrically detailed an element must be (LOD 100 conceptual box → LOD 400 fabrication-ready).

entries.label: Level of Information
entries.description: How much non-geometric data (parameters, specifications) an element carries.

entries.label: Level of Accuracy
entries.description: How precisely geometry matches real-world as-built dimensions.

entries.label: Level of Information Need
entries.description: ISO 19650-1 term replacing LOD/LOI — combines geometric + alphanumerical requirements per exchange.

entries.label: Model Production and Delivery Table
entries.description: BEP table listing every model author and what they produce at each stage.

entries.label: Project Information Model
entries.description: The federated model during design/construction (ISO 19650-2 scope).

entries.label: Asset Information Model
entries.description: The handover / in-use model (ISO 19650-3 scope).

entries.label: Construction Design and Management Regulations
entries.description: UK Health & Safety legislation requiring hazard data in BIM models.

entries.label: Chartered Institution of Building Services Engineers
entries.description: Publishes MEP design guides — StingTools uses CIBSE velocity limits, TM40 function codes, TG6 vibro-acoustic limits, Guide B for ductwork.

entries.label: Standard for Good Practice in Maintenance
entries.description: Defines maintenance task schedules — referenced in COBie Job worksheet.

entries.label: Building Research Establishment Environmental Assessment Method
entries.description: UK sustainability certification — StingTools BREEAM v6.0 assessor scores 10 weighted categories.

entries.label: London Energy Transformation Initiative
entries.description: Net-zero operational energy targets — StingTools benchmarks LCA results against LETI 2030 targets.

entries.label: Unified Classification for the Construction Industry
entries.description: UK classification system (Uniclass 2015): Ss systems, Pr products, Ac activities, EF entities — used in STING SYS/FUNC codes.

entries.label: OmniClass Construction Classification System
entries.description: North American sibling of Uniclass used by COBie and IFC exports.

entries.label: Uniformat II (ASTM E1557)
entries.description: Hierarchical building-element classification used by cost planners and COBie.

entries.label: ASTM Standard Guide for Property Condition Assessments
entries.description: Referenced by StingTools maintenance schedule generator alongside SFG20.

entries.label: Work In Progress
entries.description: Active work area — visible only to the originator. First state in the CDE lifecycle.

entries.label: Shared
entries.description: Available for reference and coordination by the project team. Requires originator sign-off.

entries.label: Published
entries.description: Authorised for use as contract information. Requires BIM Manager + Client approval.

entries.label: Archive
entries.description: Superseded or project-complete. Read-only historical record for audit.

entries.label: Superseded
entries.description: Replaced by a newer revision — retained for traceability (ISO 19650-2 Phase 40).

entries.label: Withdrawn
entries.description: Removed from the CDE, no longer valid. Cannot be restored; must be re-issued as new.

entries.label: Obsolete
entries.description: Historical record only — not for use. Terminal state; cannot transition.

entries.label: Work In Progress
entries.description: Initial status. Not for use outside the originating team.

entries.label: Suitable for Coordination
entries.description: Ready for clash and coordination checking across disciplines.

entries.label: Suitable for Information
entries.description: For reference only — not for design decisions or construction.

entries.label: Suitable for Review and Comment
entries.description: Issued for formal review with tracked comments. Maps to CDE SHARED.

entries.label: Suitable for Stage Approval / Construction
entries.description: Design freeze — submitted for client or stage sign-off. Maps to CDE PUBLISHED.

entries.label: Suitable for Manufacture / Procurement
entries.description: Approved for procurement, fabrication, or ordering. Issued to manufacturers.

entries.label: Suitable for PIM Authorization
entries.description: Authorised for the Project Information Model (ISO 19650-2).

entries.label: Suitable for AIM Authorization
entries.description: Authorised for the Asset Information Model — FM handover.

entries.label: Approved
entries.description: Client-approved construction issue (ISO 19650-2 §5.6).

entries.label: Approved with Comments
entries.description: Approved subject to tracked comments being addressed.

entries.label: Issued for Coordination
entries.description: Code written to status_history when CDE state moves WIP → SHARED.

entries.label: Issued for Approval
entries.description: Code written to status_history when CDE state moves SHARED → PUBLISHED.

entries.label: Issued for Record
entries.description: Code written to status_history when CDE state moves PUBLISHED → ARCHIVE.

entries.label: Correspondence
entries.description: Document type code for letters, emails, and formal communications.

entries.label: As-Built
entries.description: Indicates a document reflects the constructed (not designed) state.

sections.section: Document Type Codes (ISO 19650 / BS 1192 file naming)

entries.label: Drawing (2D)
entries.description: Traditional 2D drawings and plans.

entries.label: Sheet
entries.description: Drawing sheet containing one or more viewports.

entries.label: 3D Model
entries.description: Three-dimensional Revit / IFC model.

entries.label: Combined / Federated Model
entries.description: Federated model merging multiple discipline models.

entries.label: Sketch
entries.description: Conceptual or design development sketch.

entries.label: Specification
entries.description: Written product / system specification.

entries.label: Report
entries.description: Engineering / coordination report.

entries.label: Mixed Document
entries.description: Combined drawing + report package.

entries.label: Bill of Quantities
entries.description: Priced quantities of materials and labour.

entries.label: Calculations
entries.description: Engineering calculations and analysis reports.

entries.label: Information Exchange (COBie)
entries.description: COBie data exchange spreadsheet.

entries.label: Minutes / Action Notes
entries.description: Meeting records and follow-up actions.

entries.label: Health and Safety
entries.description: CDM documentation, risk assessments, H&S plans.

entries.label: Presentation
entries.description: Client presentation / stakeholder pack.

entries.label: Visualisation
entries.description: Rendered or photorealistic image.

entries.label: Product Data Sheet
entries.description: Manufacturer data for FF&E / MEP equipment.

entries.label: Schedule
entries.description: Door / window / equipment schedule.

entries.label: Operation and Maintenance Manual
entries.description: O&M manual handed over to the facilities team.

entries.label: Data Drop 1 — Concept (RIBA Stage 2)
entries.description: First milestone: ≥30% tag compliance, concept COBie Type sheet, initial clash.

entries.label: Data Drop 2 — Design (RIBA Stage 3)
entries.description: Second milestone: ≥60% tag compliance, COBie Type + System sheets required.

entries.label: Data Drop 3 — Construction (RIBA Stage 4–5)
entries.description: Third milestone: ≥85% tag compliance, full COBie export, O&M data.

entries.label: Data Drop 4 — Handover (RIBA Stage 6)
entries.description: Final milestone: ≥95% tag compliance, complete COBie, digital twin ready.

entries.label: Transmittal
entries.description: Formal document exchange record (TX-0001…) tracking who sent what to whom.

entries.label: Architecture
entries.description: Walls, doors, windows, ceilings, finishes, interior design.

entries.label: Mechanical
entries.description: HVAC, heating, cooling, ventilation, ductwork, AHU/FCU/VAV equipment.

entries.label: Electrical
entries.description: LV/ELV power distribution, lighting, fire alarm, data/comms.

entries.label: Plumbing / Public Health
entries.description: Domestic hot/cold water, sanitary drainage, rainwater, gas.

entries.label: Structural
entries.description: Columns, beams, slabs, foundations, steelwork, bracing.

entries.label: Fire Protection
entries.description: Sprinklers, fire suppression, fire-rated barriers, gas suppression.

entries.label: Low Voltage / ELV
entries.description: Data, security, CCTV, access control, AV, telecoms.

entries.label: Lightning Protection System (BS EN 62305)
entries.description: Air terminals, down conductors, earth electrodes, equipotential bonds, surge protective devices and test clamps. Sub-functions AT/DC/EE/BOND/SPD/TC are family-name resolved.

entries.label: General / Non-Disciplinary
entries.description: Elements that don't fit a specific discipline; default fallback.

entries.label: Civil Engineering
entries.description: Roads, bridges, retaining structures, external drainage.

entries.label: Interior Design
entries.description: Interior fit-out, finishes schedule, FF&E.

entries.label: Structural Engineering (Uniclass)
entries.description: Uniclass 2015 structural code where S is taken by another discipline.

entries.label: HVAC (Uniclass alt)
entries.description: Uniclass 2015 HVAC code — used when M is reserved for Mechanical only.

entries.label: Fire / Life Safety
entries.description: Fire engineering, egress, compartmentation strategy.

entries.label: Noise / Acoustics
entries.description: Acoustic assessment per BS EN 12354 / BS 8233 / BB93.

entries.label: Landscape
entries.description: External soft + hard landscape, planting, site furniture.

entries.label: Quantity Surveying
entries.description: Cost planning, BOQ, 5D quantities.

entries.label: Ventilation (Uniclass split)
entries.description: Uniclass sub-discipline when V is tracked separately from M.

entries.label: Wet Services / Water
entries.description: Used on schemes where plumbing is split from public health.

entries.label: External Works
entries.description: External drainage, hardstanding, boundary walls.

entries.label: General Coordination
entries.description: Federated coordination discipline — no discipline-specific content.

entries.label: Transport / Traffic
entries.description: Transport engineering, traffic impact.

entries.label: Urban Planning
entries.description: Planning consultant deliverables.

entries.label: Renovation / Refurbishment
entries.description: Refurbishment-specific package discipline.

entries.label: Other
entries.description: Explicit 'other' bucket for schemes with unusual disciplines.

entries.label: Drainage
entries.description: Site drainage engineering split from P.

entries.label: Building Services (Uniclass alt)
entries.description: Uniclass 2015 building services top-level code.

sections.section: STING Tag Tokens (8-segment ISO 19650 tag format)

entries.label: Discipline
entries.description: 1–2 letter discipline code (A/M/E/P/S/FP/LV/G). Stored in ASS_DISCIPLINE_COD_TXT.

entries.label: Location / Building
entries.description: Building or block code (BLD1, BLD2, EXT, XX). Stored in ASS_LOC_TXT.

entries.label: Zone
entries.description: Functional zone within the building (Z01–Z04, ZZ, XX). Stored in ASS_ZONE_TXT.

entries.label: Level
entries.description: Floor level code (L01, GF, B1, RF, XX). Stored in ASS_LVL_COD_TXT.

entries.label: System Type
entries.description: MEP system code per CIBSE/Uniclass (HVAC, DCW, SAN, LV, HWS…). Stored in ASS_SYSTEM_TYPE_TXT.

entries.label: Function
entries.description: Function code (SUP, HTG, DCW, PWR, LTG, SAN…). Stored in ASS_FUNC_TXT.

entries.label: Product
entries.description: Product / element type code (AHU, DB, FCU, WC…). Stored in ASS_PRODCT_COD_TXT.

entries.label: Sequence Number
entries.description: 4-digit sequential element number (0001, 0042). Stored in ASS_SEQ_NUM_TXT.

entries.label: Construction Status
entries.description: EXISTING / NEW / DEMOLISHED / TEMPORARY. Stored in ASS_CNSTR_STATUS_TXT.

entries.label: Revision
entries.description: Current revision code (P01, C01). Stored in ASS_REV_NUM_TXT.

entries.label: Full 8-segment ISO 19650 tag
entries.description: DISC=Mechanical, LOC=Building 1, ZONE=Z01, LVL=Level 2, SYS=HVAC, FUNC=Supply, PROD=Air Handling Unit, SEQ=0003.

entries.label: Electrical distribution board example
entries.description: DISC=Electrical, LOC=Building 2, ZONE=Z02, LVL=Ground Floor, SYS=Low Voltage, FUNC=Power, PROD=Distribution Board, SEQ=0017.

entries.label: Plumbing WC example
entries.description: DISC=Plumbing, LOC=Building 1, ZONE=Z03, LVL=Level 1, SYS=Domestic Cold Water, FUNC=Cold Water, PROD=Water Closet, SEQ=0005.

sections.section: STING Tag Containers (36 parameters across 16 groups)

entries.label: Primary Tag
entries.description: Full 8-segment ISO 19650 composite tag (universal master).

entries.label: Tag Container 2
entries.description: Discipline-specific tag container (e.g. HVAC-SUP-AHU).

entries.label: Tag Container 3
entries.description: Alternate system/function tag for schedules.

entries.label: Tag Container 4
entries.description: COBie identifier container for FM handover.

entries.label: Tag Container 5
entries.description: CAFM / FM handover tag (client-specific formats).

entries.label: Tag Container 6
entries.description: Client reference number (multi-line bottom container).

entries.label: TAG7 — Full Narrative
entries.description: Complete multi-section human-readable narrative with markup tokens.

entries.label: TAG7A — Identity Header
entries.description: Asset name, product code, manufacturer, model — bold blue.

entries.label: TAG7B — System & Function
entries.description: System type description, function code — italic green.

entries.label: TAG7C — Spatial Context
entries.description: Room, department, grid reference — normal orange.

entries.label: TAG7D — Lifecycle & Status
entries.description: Status, revision, origin, maintenance — normal red.

entries.label: TAG7E — Technical Specs
entries.description: Discipline-specific performance data (capacity, flow, voltage) — bold purple.

entries.label: TAG7F — Classification
entries.description: Uniformat, OmniClass, keynote, cost, ISO tag — italic grey.

entries.label: HVAC Equipment Tag
entries.description: Mechanical equipment (AHU/FCU/VAV/chiller) discipline container.

entries.label: HVAC Duct Tag
entries.description: Duct-specific tag — size, velocity, insulation.

entries.label: HVAC Flexible Duct Tag
entries.description: Flex connection tag for terminal devices.

entries.label: Electrical Equipment Tag
entries.description: Panels, transformers, generators.

entries.label: Electrical Fixture Tag
entries.description: Receptacles, switches, outlets.

entries.label: Lighting Fixture Tag
entries.description: Luminaire identity container.

entries.label: Electrical Conduit Tag
entries.description: Conduit routing tag.

entries.label: Cable Tray Tag
entries.description: Cable tray / basket / ladder routing.

entries.label: Plumbing Equipment Tag
entries.description: Water heaters, pumps, booster sets.

entries.label: Fire / Life Safety Device Tag
entries.description: Detectors, alarms, sprinkler heads.

entries.label: Communications Device Tag
entries.description: Data outlets, patch panels, switches.

entries.label: Security Device Tag
entries.description: CCTV cameras, card readers, intercoms.

entries.label: Nurse Call Device Tag
entries.description: Healthcare nurse-call / emergency call devices.

entries.label: ICT Device Tag
entries.description: Information and communications technology devices.

entries.label: Material Tag 1
entries.description: Primary material identification container (1 of 6).

entries.label: Material Tag 2
entries.description: Secondary material reference.

entries.label: Material Tag 3
entries.description: Material classification / Uniclass code.

entries.label: Material Tag 4
entries.description: Manufacturer / supplier reference.

entries.label: Material Tag 5
entries.description: Finish / colour specification.

entries.label: Material Tag 6
entries.description: Sustainability / embodied carbon reference.

entries.label: Strategic Definition
entries.description: Business case, project brief, site selection. Maps to data drop — pre-DD1.

entries.label: Preparation and Briefing
entries.description: Project brief development, site appraisal. Pre-DD1.

entries.label: Concept Design
entries.description: Initial design proposals, spatial strategy. Aligns with DD1.

entries.label: Spatial Coordination
entries.description: Developed design, cross-discipline coordination. Aligns with DD2.

entries.label: Technical Design
entries.description: Production information, specifications, details. Aligns with DD3.

entries.label: Manufacturing & Construction
entries.description: Construction on site. COBie progressively populated. DD3.

entries.label: Handover
entries.description: Practical completion, FM setup, O&M handover. Aligns with DD4.

entries.label: Use
entries.description: In-use, post-occupancy evaluation, digital twin operation.

entries.label: Client / Appointing Party

entries.label: BIM Manager

entries.label: Contract Administrator

entries.label: MEP Engineer
